item.title: Short girls it’s our TIME! I’m 5’0 and these aren’t too long at all they’re actually the perfect length. (Petite version) I’m wearing a size S and my measurements are: Waist: 25in Hips: 36in There’s also a non petite version! I wear these any chance I get
item.description: Short girls it’s our TIME! I’m 5’0 and these aren’t too long at all they’re actually the perfect length. (Petite version) I’m wearing a size S and my measurements are: Waist: 25in Hips: 36in There’s also a non petite version! I wear these any chance I get

item.title: Welcome to my 45g protein breakfast every morning lol. Seriously yall I never liked protein powder smoothies but I picked the Dole one up ab a month ago and have been using it religiously. A little bit of chocolate chips helps too but it’s still good with

item.title: Liquid IV is my holy grail when I’m sick. I double down on Vitamin C and do the zicam nose swabs too. I need everyone else’s remedies pls 👇🏼

item.title: Oh if it isn’t the domino effect. The red car coming out of the side street was completely blocked, we couldn’t see it. So, no way to prepare for that lol. W Max for the reaction Cardo: Code KAWILEXI for 10% off! Monster Fairings: Code LEXI for discount!

item.title: Adding another pole grip to my collection 🤣 honest rating of this one: 8/10. Superrr sticky when applied but dries out kinda quick. That’s any liquid grip though. Had to reapply a few times but will be using it!! #polegrip #poledancing #pole
item.description: Adding another pole grip to my collection 🤣 honest rating of this one: 8/10. Superrr sticky when applied but dries out kinda quick. That’s any liquid grip though. Had to reapply a few times but will be using it!! #polegrip #poledancing #pole

item.title: Just incase you get a little tired while on the highway, the new feature has arrived: the middle lane couch! What’s the weirdest thing you’ve seen on the highway? 😂 FAQ: How do we talk and record audio? I use @cardosystems Packtalk Edge with their app! C
